Defy gravity and play with your own aura. ✨

A unique levitation animation where your avatar floats while tossing their head in the air and catching it with style. A mysterious and powerful aura moment that instantly makes your avatar stand out.

items.name: Futball Head ⚽🪖
items.description:
Take the game to a whole new level—literally. Pop your head off, juggle it like a pro with slick soccer footwork, then send it flying with a back-kick before catching it mid-air and locking it back in place.
